title: melaleuca glaberrima
intro: Melaleuca glaberrima is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, Myrtaceae, that is native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Melaleuca glaberrima include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Melaleuca glaberrima typically include essential oils, which can be used topically or added to herbal teas for their medicinal benefits.
